mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flower_redemption (student_id, item_id, item_name, flower_cost, qty, time_minutes, status, redeem_date, redeem_time, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{flowerCost}, #{qty}, #{timeMinutes, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status}, #{redeemDate}, #{redeemTime}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM flower_redemption WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY redeem_time DESC
SELECT fr.* FROM flower_redemption fr INNER JOIN user u ON u.id = fr.student_id WHERE u.parent_id = #{parentId} AND fr.status = 0 ORDER BY fr.redeem_time DESC
